goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west' and should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'birmingham new street' and should leave on 'saturday'.
The train should 'arrive by 20:45' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west and should be in the type of museum
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to birmingham new street and should leave on saturday
The train should arrive by 20:45 and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get departure time
